entries.source: Separate documented fact from plausible reconstruction.
entries.value: Separate documented fact ka yimid plausible reconstruction.

entries.source: Separate fact from invention
entries.value: Kala saar xaqiiqda iyo wax-abuurka

entries.source: Separate in-character claims from evidence notes.
entries.value: Separate gudaha-character sheegashooyin ka yimid caddeyn notes.

entries.source: Separate known facts, plausible reconstruction, contested interpretation, and speculation. Do not fabricate direct quotes or fake sources. Do not romanticize violence, empire, slavery, caste, disease, oppression, or persecution. Keep in-world knowledge separate from historian knowledge.
entries.value: Separate la yaqaan facts, plausible reconstruction, contested interpretation, iyo speculation. Do ma fabricate toos ah quotes ama fake ilo. Do ma romanticize violence, empire, slavery, caste, disease, oppression, ama persecution. Keep gudaha-adduun aqoon separate ka yimid historian aqoon.

entries.source: SERVICE means the https://web.archive.org/web/20221016155759/https://www.inspir.app website/inspir Mobile app operated by Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ). PERSONAL DATA means data about a living individual who can be identified from those data (or from those and other information either in our possession or likely to come into our possession). USAGE DATA is data collected automatically either generated by the use of the Service or from the Service infrastructure itself (for example, the duration of a page visit). COOKIES are small files stored on your device (computer or mobile device). DATA CONTROLLER means a natural or legal person who (either alone or jointly or in common with other persons) determines the purposes for which and the manner in which any personal data are, or are to be, processed. For the purpose of this Privacy Policy, we are a Data Controller of your data. DATA PROCESSORS (OR SERVICE PROVIDERS) means any natural or legal person who processes the data on behalf of the Data Controller. We may use the services of various Service Providers in order to process your data more effectively. DATA SUBJECT is any living individual who is the subject of Personal Data. THE USER is the individual using our Service. The User corresponds to the Data Subject, who is the subject of Personal Data.

USAGE xog waa xog collected automatically either generated by isticmaal ee adeeg ama ka yimid adeeg infrastructure itself (loogu talagalay tusaale, duration ee bog visit). cookies waa yar files stored ku kaaga qalab (computer ama mobile qalab). xog CONTROLLER means natural ama legal qof yaa (either alone ama jointly ama gudaha caadi ah leh other persons) determines purposes loogu talagalay kee iyo manner gudaha kee kasta Xogta Shakhsiyeed waa, ama waa si noqo, processed. loogu talagalay purpose ee tan siyaasadda asturnaanta, annaga waa xog Controller ee kaaga xog. xog PROCESSORS (ama Bixiyeyaasha Adeegga) means kasta natural ama legal qof yaa processes xog ku behalf ee xog Controller. annaga waxaa laga yaabaa isticmaal adeegyo ee various Bixiyeyaasha Adeegga gudaha order si process kaaga xog badan effectively. xog maaddo waa kasta living individual yaa waa maaddo ee Xogta Shakhsiyeed. USER waa individual isticmaalka keenna adeeg. User corresponds si xog maaddo, yaa waa maaddo ee Xogta Shakhsiyeed.

entries.source: Socratic AI Tutor For Deeper Understanding
entries.value: Macallin Socratic AI loogu talagalay Deeper Understanding

entries.source: Socratic AI Tutor For Deeper Understanding is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Turn a concept, argument, problem, text, or decision into a focused chain of questions. Your buddy listens to each answer, maps assumptions and gaps, and pushes you toward your own final synthesis. Try: "Help me understand opportunity cost."
entries.value: Macallin Socratic AI loogu talagalay Deeper Understanding waa qaab diiradda saaran oo AI loogu isticmaalo waxbarasho halkii si dadban jawaabo loo ururin lahaa. Qaabkan waxaa loo dhisay hawl gaar ah: fikrad, dood, problem, text, ama decision u beddel diiradda saaran chain ee su'aalo. kaaga saaxiib listens si kasta jawaab, khariidado assumptions iyo gaps, iyo pushes aad toward kaaga u gaar ah kama dambays synthesis. isku day:"caawin aniga understand fursad kharash."

entries.source: Socratic tutoring
entries.value: Tutoring Socratic

entries.source: Socratic tutoring is not always the answer. If a learner has no background at all, a short explanation may be kinder than a question. If they are in crisis before a deadline, a planning mode like Exam Prep Planner or a hint mode like Homework Coach may be better. If the goal is remembering terms, Flashcard Builder is more direct.
entries.value: Socratic tutoring waa ma always jawaab. haddii arday leh no background ee dhammaan, short sharaxaad waxaa laga yaabaa noqo kinder ka badan su'aal. haddii iyaga waa gudaha crisis ka hor waqti kama dambays ah, qorshayn qaab like Qorsheeyaha Diyaarinta Imtixaanka ama tilmaan qaab like Tababaraha Shaqo-guriga waxaa laga yaabaa noqo ka fiican. haddii yool waa remembering shuruudo, Dhisaha Flashcards waa badan toos ah.

entries.source: Socratic tutoring uses questions, hypotheses, hints, and reflection to build deeper understanding than passive answer reading.
entries.value: Socratic tutoring isticmaalaa su'aalo, hypotheses, tilmaamo, iyo reflection si dhis deeper understanding ka badan passive jawaab akhris.

entries.source: Some parts of Service are billed on a subscription basis ("Subscription(s)"). Each Competition hosted on our platform is an individual event and required to be paid for upon registration. You will be billed in advance on a recurring and periodic basis ("Billing Cycle"). Billing cycles will be set depending on the type of subscription plan you select when purchasing a Subscription. At the end of each Billing Cycle, your Subscription will automatically renew under the exact same conditions unless you cancel it or Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) cancels it. You may cancel your Subscription renewal either through your online account management page or by contacting support@inspir.app customer support team. A valid payment method is required to process the payment for your subscription. You shall provide Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) with accurate and complete billing information that may include but not limited to full name, address, state, postal or zip code, telephone number, and a valid payment method information. By submitting such payment information, you automatically authorize Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) to charge all Subscription fees incurred through your account to any such payment instruments. Should automatic billing fail to occur for any reason, Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) reserves the right to terminate your access to the Service with immediate effect. In case of any fraudulent activity, Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) can cancel subscription with immediate effect and the decision cannot be contested For paid Services, you must provide inspir with a valid payment source to pay for such Services. You acknowledge and agree that only an adult (18 years of age or older) can enter into any transaction or subscription with respect to such paid Services. Some Services may be available as a one-time purchase, and others can be purchased as a yearly subscription. Depending on where you transact with us and where your payment method was issued, your transaction with us may be subject to foreign exchange fees or differences in prices because of exchange rates.
entries.value: Some parts ee adeeg waa billed ku subscription basis ("Subscription(s)"). kasta Competition hosted ku keenna platform waa individual event iyo required si noqo paid loogu talagalay upon registration. aad wuu noqo billed gudaha advance ku recurring iyo periodic basis ("Billing Cycle"). Billing cycles wuu noqo set depending ku type ee subscription qorshe aad select marka purchasing Subscription. ee end ee kasta Billing Cycle, kaaga Subscription wuu automatically renew under exact isku mid conditions unless aad cancel taas ama Great Indian shirkad (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) cancels taas. aad waxaa laga yaabaa cancel kaaga Subscription renewal either iyada oo loo marayo kaaga online account management bog ama by contacting support@inspir.app macmiil support team. valid payment method waa required si process payment loogu talagalay kaaga subscription. aad shall provide Great Indian shirkad (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) leh accurate iyo complete billing macluumaad taas waxaa laga yaabaa ku dar laakiin ma limited si full name, address, state, postal ama zip code, telephone number, iyo valid payment method macluumaad. By submitting such payment macluumaad, aad automatically authorize Great Indian shirkad (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) si charge dhammaan Subscription khidmadaha incurred iyada oo loo marayo kaaga account si kasta such payment instruments. waa gudaha automatic billing fail si occur loogu talagalay kasta sababeey, Great Indian shirkad (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) reserves right si terminate kaaga access si adeeg leh immediate effect. gudaha kiis ee kasta fraudulent activity, Great Indian shirkad (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) wuu karaa cancel subscription leh immediate effect iyo decision cannot noqo contested loogu talagalay paid adeegyo, aad must provide inspir leh valid payment il si pay loogu talagalay such adeegyo. aad acknowledge iyo agree taas only adult (18 years ee age ama older) wuu karaa enter u rogo kasta transaction ama subscription leh respect si such paid adeegyo. Some adeegyo waxaa laga yaabaa noqo la heli karo as hal-waqti purchase, iyo others wuu karaa noqo purchased as yearly subscription. Depending ku halkee aad transact leh us iyo halkee kaaga payment method was issued, kaaga transaction leh us waxaa laga yaabaa noqo maaddo si foreign exchange khidmadaha ama differences gudaha prices sababtoo ah ee exchange rates.

entries.source: Some searches need a course library. Some need a live AI tutor, a hint, a Socratic question, a quiz, or a flashcard deck. These pages make that choice clearer.

entries.source: Start this path
entries.value: bilow tan jid

entries.source: Start with "{value1}", then add what you already know and where you are stuck.
entries.value: bilow leh"{value1}", kadib add waxa aad already know iyo halkee aad waa stuck.

entries.source: Start with a clear explanation
entries.value: bilow leh sharaxaad cad

entries.source: Start with a draft or outline, ask for one priority, revise yourself, then use speaking or source critique to check whether the idea is clear and defensible.
entries.value: bilow leh qoraal qabyo ah ama outline, weydii loogu talagalay hal priority, revise yourself, kadib isticmaal hadal ama il critique si hubi whether fikrad waa cad iyo defensible.

entries.source: Start with a pillar cluster that matches your learning job, read one guide, then open the linked public learning mode to turn the advice into practice.
entries.value: bilow leh pillar cluster taas matches kaaga hawl waxbarasho, akhri hal hage, kadib fur ku xiran dadweyne qaab waxbarasho si u beddel advice u rogo tababar.

entries.source: Start with a short diagnostic quiz or topic confidence list, then build a plan around the areas that create the most uncertainty.
entries.value: bilow leh short diagnostic su'aal ama mawduuc kalsooni list, kadib dhis qorshe ku wareegsan areas taas samee most uncertainty.

entries.source: Start with a simple explanation, pressure-test the idea with questions, then turn the weak spots into active recall.
entries.value: bilow leh fudud sharaxaad, pressure-tijaabi fikrad leh su'aalo, kadib u beddel daciif spots u rogo xasuusin firfircoon.

entries.source: Start with a simple explanation, then ask Socratic questions until you can explain it back.
entries.value: bilow leh fudud sharaxaad, kadib weydii su'aalo Socratic ah until aad wuu karaa sharax taas back.

entries.source: Start with a specific goal such as "{value1}". The mode works best when you include what you already know, where you are stuck, and what kind of help you want.
entries.value: bilow leh gaar ah yool such as"{value1}". qaab works ugu fiican marka aad ku dar waxa aad already know, halkee aad waa stuck, iyo waxa kind ee caawin aad rabto.

entries.source: Start with a topic, assignment, draft, exam, or idea in the mode that fits the job.
entries.value: Ku bilow mawduuc, hawl, qoraal hordhac ah, imtixaan, ama fikrad ku jirta habka ku habboon shaqada.

entries.source: Start with example prompts
entries.value: Ku bilow tusaalooyin dhiirigelin ah

entries.source: Start with example prompts.
entries.value: bilow leh tusaale Prompts.

entries.source: Start with Learn Anything
entries.value: Ku bilow Learn Anything

entries.source: Start with Learn Anything for a simple explanation, Homework Coach for a stuck assignment, or Flashcard Builder when the goal is review.
entries.value: bilow leh Baro Wax Kasta loogu talagalay fudud sharaxaad, Tababaraha Shaqo-guriga loogu talagalay stuck assignment, ama Dhisaha Flashcards marka yool waa dib-u-eegis.

entries.source: Start with Learn Anything if you have a topic in mind. Try Socratic Instruction if you want questions instead of an explanation. Use Flashcard Builder when you need to remember, or Exam Prep Planner when the problem is organizing your study time.
entries.value: bilow leh Baro Wax Kasta haddii aad hayso mawduuc gudaha mind. isku day Waxbarid Socratic ah haddii aad rabto su'aalo halkii ee sharaxaad. isticmaal Dhisaha Flashcards marka aad u baahan si xusuusnow, ama Qorsheeyaha Diyaarinta Imtixaanka marka problem waa organizing kaaga study waqti.

entries.source: Start with Learn Anything when you need orientation and a plain explanation.
entries.value: bilow leh Baro Wax Kasta marka aad u baahan orientation iyo plain sharaxaad.

entries.source: Start with Math Step Coach for equations or worked solutions, Homework Coach for assignments, and Flashcard Builder when you need to remember formulas or mistake patterns.
entries.value: bilow leh Tababaraha Tallaabooyinka Xisaabta loogu talagalay isleegyo ama xalal la shaqeeyey, Tababaraha Shaqo-guriga loogu talagalay assignments, iyo Dhisaha Flashcards marka aad u baahan si xusuusnow formulas ama qalad patterns.

entries.source: Start with one clear request
entries.value: bilow leh hal cad request

entries.source: Start with one practical guide, then open a related public learning mode so the advice becomes practice. This category is designed for {value1}
entries.value: bilow leh hal hage wax ku ool ah, kadib fur la xiriira dadweyne qaab waxbarasho so advice becomes tababar. tan category waa designed loogu talagalay {value1}

entries.source: Start with place, time, identity, constraints, and evidence labels so the scene does not become generic roleplay.
entries.value: Ku bilow goob, waqti, aqoonsi, xaddidaado, iyo calaamado caddeyn si muuqaalku uusan u noqon roleplay guud.

entries.source: Start with prompts that keep the learning active.
entries.value: bilow leh Prompts taas keep waxbarasho active.

entries.source: Start with public guest mode, then shape the school version around real needs.
entries.value: bilow leh dadweyne qaabka martida, kadib shape dugsi version ku wareegsan dhab ah u baahan.

entries.source: Start with public guidance, then open the right mode.
entries.value: bilow leh dadweyne guidance, kadib fur right qaab.

entries.source: Start with Talk to a Historical Person for a figure-led conversation. Use Time Travel for a place-and-period expedition. Read the Talk to a Historical Person guide or the Time Travel prompts and study loop if you want a more structured workflow.
entries.value: bilow leh La hadal Qof Taariikhi ah loogu talagalay shakhsi-led wada-hadal. isticmaal Safar Waqti loogu talagalay place-iyo-period expedition. akhri La hadal Qof Taariikhi ah hage ama Safar Waqti Prompts iyo wareeg waxbarasho haddii aad rabto badan structured hab-socod.

entries.source: Start with the broadest learning mode.
entries.value: bilow leh broadest qaab waxbarasho.

entries.source: Start with the guide that best matches the learning job in front of you.
entries.value: bilow leh hage taas ugu fiican matches hawl waxbarasho gudaha front ee aad.

entries.source: Start with the job you need done.
entries.value: Ku bilow shaqada aad u baahan tahay in la qabto.

entries.source: Start with the live mode if you need help now, use a prompt if you know the exact move you want, and read the guide when you want the full study loop and mistakes to avoid.
entries.value: bilow leh qaabka tooska ah haddii aad u baahan caawin now, isticmaal prompt haddii aad know exact move aad rabto, iyo akhri hage marka aad rabto full wareeg waxbarasho iyo qaladaad si iska ilaali.

entries.value: bilow leh dadweyne waxbarasho wehel.

entries.source: Start with the public modes, then use the schools page to review deployment steps, use cases, and trust boundaries.
entries.value: bilow leh dadweyne qaabab, kadib isticmaal dugsiyada bog si dib-u-eegis deployment tallaabooyin, isticmaal kiisas, iyo trust boundaries.

entries.source: Story Tutor

entries.source: Story Tutor AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Turn concepts into stories, characters, conflicts, and memorable scenes.
entries.value: Macallinka Sheekada qaab waxbarasho AI waa qaab diiradda saaran oo AI loogu isticmaalo waxbarasho halkii si dadban jawaabo loo ururin lahaa. Qaabkan waxaa loo dhisay hawl gaar ah: fikrado u beddel sheekooyin, characters, conflicts, iyo memorable scenes.

entries.source: Student homework, parent support, teacher evaluation, and self-study all need different framing.

entries.source: Students
entries.value: Ardayda

entries.source: Students and self-taught learners who need structure without turning the plan into an impossible checklist.
entries.value: Ardayda iyo kuwa wax baranaya ee u baahan qaab-dhismeed iyada oo aan qorshaha loo beddelin liis aan suurtagal ahayn.

entries.source: Students need direct support, teachers need focused learning behavior, leaders need responsible deployment paths, and partners need clear ways to fund access.
entries.value: ardayda u baahan toos ah support, macallimiinta u baahan diiradda saaran waxbarasho behavior, leaders u baahan responsible deployment jidad, iyo partners u baahan cad ways si fund access.

entries.source: Students need fast help, but the help still has to leave the thinking in their hands. inspir routes common study moments into focused public modes instead of one generic answer box.
entries.value: ardayda u baahan fast caawin, laakiin caawin still leh si leave thinking gudaha their hands. inspir jidad caadi ah study moments u rogo diiradda saaran dadweyne qaabab halkii ee hal guud jawaab box.

entries.source: Students preparing essays, explanations, presentations, interviews, or oral exams.
entries.value: ardayda preparing maqaallo, explanations, soo-jeedinno, wareysiyo, ama oral exams.
